use_case: AI 实施公司 Ode，初始资金 15 亿美元
reported_delivery_components: One of those businesses now has a name: Ode with Anthropic is the $1.5 billion, AI implementation company that the AI lab launched in May as part of a joint venture with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs, and others. The move follows OpenAI’s own take on this, The Deployment Company, underscoring a growing acknowledgement among frontier AI labs that winning enterprise customers requires far more than shipping better models.

use_case: Scaling Reliability AI Deployment Across Global Asset Operations
reported_need: Reduce unplanned downtime and deliver economic value through operationalized enterprise AI for predictive maintenance
reported_delivery_components: C3 AI and Shell Expand Collaboration, Scaling Reliability AI Deployment Across Global Asset Operations
reported_outcomes: Hundreds of millions of dollars in economic value from reduced unplanned downtime

use_case: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to Secure AI Agents
reported_need: Cybersecurity leaders estimate that in the next year, half or more of attacks they face will be driven by agentic AI
reported_delivery_components: Rubrik Announces Upcoming Integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to Secure AI Agents

AWS Summit -- Rubrik (NYSE: RBRK), the Security and AI Operations company, announced today its upcoming Rubrik Agent Cloud (RAC) integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. The upcoming integration reflects Rubrik's commitment to extending the security controls customers already trust into agentic workflows.

"Speed has always been the enterprise mandate, but today, safety is the prerequisite," said Devvret Rishi, General Manager AI, Rubrik. "Cybersecurity leaders estimate that in the next year, half or more of attacks they face will be driven by agentic AI. Rubrik’s upcoming integration with AWS Bedrock AgentCore gives enterprises the confidence to deploy AI agents quickly with trustworthy governance."
